item.title: Spot Job Description Red Flags 🚩 • Look for vague language like 'fast-paced' or 'wear many hats'. • Check for unrealistic requirements or too many must-haves. • Watch for phrases like 'competitive salary' without specifics. • Note excessive use of 'must' and 'required'. • Consider high turnover clues like 'newly created position'. What specific red flags have you encountered in job descriptions? #jobsearch #careeradvice #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Spot Job Description Red Flags 🚩 • Look for vague language like 'fast-paced' or 'wear many hats'. • Check for unrealistic requirements or too many must-haves. • Watch for phrases like 'competitive salary' without specifics. • Note excessive use of 'must' and 'required'. • Consider high turnover clues like 'newly created position'. What specific red flags have you encountered in job descriptions? #jobsearch #careeradvice #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
